title: Enhanced codebase scanning for Sense phase (brownfield support)
description: Enhance the Sense engine to deeply analyze existing codebases: detect project structure (src/lib/docs/tests dirs), identify frameworks (React, Express, Next.js, Vue, etc.) from package.json dependencies, find test frameworks and coverage configs, detect TypeScript/JavaScript mix, identify existing CI/CD configs. This enables spec-graph to provide meaningful guidance when taking over legacy projects, not just greenfield ones.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
